arcs.title: The Briefcase Returns
arcs.summary: New arc opening quietly: a glowing briefcase logged as 'Unattended (Luminous)' passed through Ministry security at eleven-oh-three Friday evening and was collected by a short, unnamed man in a suit who appeared extremely motivated. The Ministry's Saturday bulletin referenced it once and did not return to the subject. Day 2 should establish where the briefcase went — whether it surfaces in Diagon Alley, at Gringotts, or somewhere altogether less expected — and who, if anyone, is looking for it.
